description: Validation profile for client identity verification documents. Governs KYC/AML rules applied during evidence ingestion under the Money Laundering, Terrorist Financing and Transfer of Funds Regulations 2017.

rules.description: Document image or scan must be clear, unobstructed, and all text must be readable.
The identity document must not be past its expiry date at the point of verification.
Document type must be one of the accepted primary identity document types (see documentType enum).
The method used to verify the document (in-person, electronic, video) must be explicitly recorded.
A PEP and sanctions screening check must be on file and must return CLEAR or have a documented rationale for a POSSIBLE_MATCH.
Proof of address document must accompany primary identity — dated within 3 months for utility bills and bank statements.
Where verificationMethod=ELECTRONIC_VERIFICATION, a provider reference number must be recorded.
